title: knautia arvensis var. sylvatica
intro: Knautia arvensis var. sylvatica, also known as the woodland field knawel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caprifoliaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Knautia arvensis var. sylvatica include its potential to alleviate digestive problems, such as diarrhea and nausea, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and its leaves and roots can be used fresh or dried for further processing.
